exercises.sentence: Todos los lunes yo ___ una pelicula en el cine.
exercises.translation: Every Monday I see a movie at the cinema.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a mis amigos en el parque cada tarde.
exercises.translation: I see my friends at the park every afternoon.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ el sol salir por la ventana.
exercises.translation: I see the sun rising through the window.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ muy bien con esas gafas nuevas.
exercises.translation: You see very well with those new glasses.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ a tu hermano en la escuela, verdad?
exercises.translation: You see your brother at school, right?

exercises.sentence: Siempre ___ el mismo programa de television.
exercises.translation: You always watch the same television program.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a su abuela todos los domingos.
exercises.translation: She sees her grandmother every Sunday.

exercises.sentence: El ___ la noticia en internet por la mañana.
exercises.translation: He sees the news on the internet in the morning.

exercises.sentence: El niño ___ los pajaritos volar en el jardin.
exercises.translation: The boy sees the little birds flying in the garden.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a Maria en la fiesta ayer por la noche.
exercises.translation: I saw Maria at the party last night.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ una pelicula de terror el sabado pasado.
exercises.translation: I watched a horror movie last Saturday.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ ese monumento cuando viaje a Madrid.
exercises.translation: I saw that monument when I traveled to Madrid.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ a Juan en la biblioteca ayer.
exercises.translation: You saw Juan at the library yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ el partido de futbol en la tele?
exercises.translation: Did you watch the soccer game on TV?

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ algo raro en el camino a casa?
exercises.translation: Did you see anything strange on the way home?

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ un arcoiris despues de la lluvia.
exercises.translation: She saw a rainbow after the rain.

exercises.sentence: El ___ a su mejor amigo en el centro comercial.
exercises.translation: He saw his best friend at the mall.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ el anuncio en el periodico ayer.
exercises.translation: She saw the advertisement in the newspaper yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ___ dibujos animados cada mañana.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I used to watch cartoons every morning.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a mis abuelos muy seguido en verano.
exercises.translation: I used to see my grandparents very often in summer.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ el mar desde mi ventana en la playa.
exercises.translation: I used to see the sea from my window at the beach.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ a tu profesora en el supermercado con frecuencia.
exercises.translation: You used to see your teacher at the supermarket often.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ ese programa de comedia casi todos los dias.
exercises.translation: You used to watch that comedy show almost every day.

exercises.sentence: Antes tu ___ muy feliz cuando ibas al parque.
exercises.translation: Before you looked very happy when you went to the park.

exercises.sentence: El ___ a sus amigos cada fin de semana.
exercises.translation: He used to see his friends every weekend.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ la lluvia caer por horas desde su cuarto.
exercises.translation: She used to watch the rain fall for hours from her room.

exercises.sentence: El ___ muchas peliculas antiguas en el cine local.
exercises.translation: He used to watch many old movies at the local cinema.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ esa pelicula si tuviera tiempo libre.
exercises.translation: I would watch that movie if I had free time.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a los animales en el zoo si fuera domingo.
exercises.translation: I would see the animals at the zoo if it were Sunday.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ mejor con gafas, pero no las uso.
exercises.translation: I would see better with glasses, but I don't use them.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ mas feliz si salieras a caminar hoy.
exercises.translation: You would look happier if you went out for a walk today.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ el partido si tuvieras entrada.
exercises.translation: You would watch the game if you had a ticket.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ la verdad si me escucharas.
exercises.translation: You would see the truth if you listened to me.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ el museo si estuviera en la ciudad.
exercises.translation: She would see the museum if she were in the city.

exercises.sentence: El ___ el amanecer si se despertara temprano.
exercises.translation: He would see the sunrise if he woke up early.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a su familia mañana si pudiera viajar.
exercises.translation: She would see her family tomorrow if she could travel.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo ___ a mi dentista para una revision.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will see my dentist for a check-up.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ el final de la serie este fin de semana.
exercises.translation: I will watch the end of the series this weekend.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a mis primos en la boda en agosto.
exercises.translation: I will see my cousins at the wedding in August.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ una gran diferencia cuando termines el proyecto.
exercises.translation: You will see a big difference when you finish the project.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ la pelicula nueva en el cine el viernes.
exercises.translation: You will watch the new movie at the cinema on Friday.

exercises.sentence: Tu ___ a tus amigos pronto, no te preocupes.
exercises.translation: You will see your friends soon, don't worry.

exercises.sentence: El ___ el resultado de su examen mañana.
exercises.translation: He will see the result of his exam tomorrow.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ a sus abuelos el proximo verano.
exercises.translation: She will see her grandparents next summer.

exercises.sentence: El ___ el partido en casa con su familia.
exercises.translation: He will watch the game at home with his family.
